mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COPTC LEFT JOIN COPTD ON TC001=TD001 AND TC002=TD002 LEFT JOIN COPMA ON MA001 = TC004 WHERE TC027 = 'Y' AND TD013 < SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEADD(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 112), 1, 8) AND TD016 = 'N'

SELECT TD003 AS orderSerialNumber, COPTC.TC001 AS orderSingle, COPTC.TC003 AS orderDate, TC002 AS orderNumber, COPTD.UDF01 AS controlNumber, MA002 AS customerName, TD014 AS customerNumber, TD004 AS orderNum, TD005 AS orderName, TD006 AS specification, CAST(TD008 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS orderQuantity, CAST(TD009 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) AS deliveredQuantity, TD013 AS estimateDeliveryDate FROM COPTC LEFT JOIN COPTD ON COPTC.TC001 = COPTD.TD001 AND COPTC.TC002 = COPTD.TD002 LEFT JOIN COPMA ON COPTC.TC004 = COPMA.MA001 WHERE COPTC.TC027 = 'Y' AND COPTD.TD013 < SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEADD(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 112), 1, 8) AND COPTD.TD016 = 'N' ORDER BY COPTC.TC003 DESC

SELECT TC001 orderSingle,TC003 orderDate,TC002 orderNumber,COPTD.UDF01 controlNumber,MA002 customerName,TD014 customerNumber, TD004 orderNum,TD005 orderName,TD006 specification,CAST(TD008 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) orderQuantity,CAST(TD009 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)) deliveredQuantity,TD013 estimateDeliveryDate FROM COPTC LEFT JOIN COPTD ON TC001=TD001 AND TC002=TD002 LEFT JOIN COPMA ON MA001 = TC004 WHERE TC027 = 'Y' AND TD013 < SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEADD(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 112), 1, 8) AND TD016 = 'N' AND TD001 = #{orderSingle} AND TD002 = #{orderNumber} AND TD003 = #{orderSerialNumber}
